hooks.command: sh -c 'command -v mainline >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec mainline hooks codex session-start || exit 0'
sh -c 'command -v mainline >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec mainline hooks codex stop || exit 0'
sh -c 'command -v mainline >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec mainline hooks codex user-prompt-submit || exit 0'
